project_insight.headline: Project comparison complete
project_insight.summary: The strongest board is thermal_hotspot_board.kicad_pcb at 20.0 / 100, while the weakest board is high_speed_pair_bad.kicad_pcb at 6.4 / 100. The current score spread across the project is 13.6 points. The most recurring issue area across the project is power integrity.

risks.why_it_matters: Oscillators and crystals work best when their loop to the controller is short, quiet, and physically compact.
risks.trigger_condition: A detected clock source was placed farther from the nearest likely controller than the configured timing-source distance threshold.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DP has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DN has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
risks.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow copper in a long high-current path increases resistive loss, heating, and voltage-drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net used a minimum width below the configured current-density limit over a materially long route.
risks.threshold_label: Minimum high-current width 0.70 units with maximum bottleneck length 24.00 units
risks.observed_label: Observed minimum width 0.25 units over 84.02 routed units

risks.message: U1 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

risks.message: Differential pair USB has a length mismatch of 33.53 units
risks.recommendation: Length-match the positive and negative pair routes more closely to reduce skew.
risks.why_it_matters: Differential pair skew can collapse timing margin and degrade signal integrity on high-speed links.
risks.trigger_condition: Differential-pair route length mismatch exceeded the configured skew threshold.

risks.message: Switching or power net VBUS forms a long exposed loop path
risks.recommendation: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.
risks.why_it_matters: Large current loops increase magnetic field radiation and make noisy power stages harder to contain.
risks.trigger_condition: A switching or power-oriented net exceeded the configured loop-length threshold.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DP changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.
risks.short_title: Weak EMC containment across layer changes
risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DN changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.

risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

risks.message: Net CLK uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS uses a long routed path
risks.recommendation: Shorten the power path and tighten the source-to-load loop to reduce parasitic resistance and inductance.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-current routes add drop, loop inductance, and dynamic noise in power delivery paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net exceeded the configured maximum routed-length threshold.

risks.message: Ground strategy looks light on stitching support for net GND (0 vias)
risks.recommendation: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.
risks.why_it_matters: Weak ground stitching can reduce return-path quality and board robustness outside ideal lab conditions.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground via count fell below the configured minimum stitching threshold for a multi-layer board.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (3 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

risks.message: High-voltage pad on J1:VBUS is close to J1:USB_DP
risks.recommendation: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.
risks.why_it_matters: Clearance shortfalls in elevated-voltage regions can create direct insulation and safety failures.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-voltage pad-to-pad spacing fell below the configured clearance threshold.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)

risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

risks.message: Net USB_DN has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.
risks.why_it_matters: Long critical routes on a minimal stackup are harder to keep well referenced and more sensitive to return-path problems.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical net exceeded the two-layer critical-length threshold while board copper layers stayed limited.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP changes layers without nearby ground-return stitching

interaction_risks.message: Clocking and fast connectivity subsystems share board context and need timing-containment review.
interaction_risks.recommendation: Check clock-source placement, reference continuity, and keepout from high-speed connectors.
interaction_risks.why_it_matters: Weak clock containment can amplify timing sensitivity and EMI risk.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows elevated design risk. The main risk concentration is in signal integrity. The highest-priority issue is High-voltage pad on J1:VBUS is close to J1:USB_DP. The current design snapshot includes 3 components and 5 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.
